opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is throbbing so badly I can't see straight out of the sides of my eyes, and my hands are too swollen and painful to even hold a cup. (Spouse on the call, very worried, says he's gone downhill fast tonight.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache has been building for two days and tonight I've started losing the vision at the edges of my eyes, and I can't walk safely to the bathroom because of my joints.

symptom_narrative.onset: The severe headache has been building over about 48 hours; the loss of side vision came on today. The changes in my hands, feet and face have been creeping up slowly over about two years.
symptom_narrative.duration: Headache ~2 days and worse tonight; vision change today; the body changes over ~2 years
symptom_narrative.character: A relentless throbbing headache across both sides of my head, and now I can't see properly out to the sides. My hands and feet have slowly got bigger, my joints ache badly, and my face and voice have changed.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The worst it's been — I can't hold a cup and I can't walk to the bathroom on my own tonight
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: Head on both sides; vision at the outer edges of both eyes; big joints — shoulders and knees; hands and feet
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: The headache is constant and getting worse; the vision loss and the mobility have got dramatically worse just today
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Nothing much — I took some paracetamol and ibuprofen and it barely touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: It seems to be getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been sweating a lot and my skin feels oily, my voice has got deeper, and my rings and shoes stopped fitting so I had to buy bigger sizes
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get headaches sometimes but never like this, and never with losing my vision
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: Usually I'm independent; tonight I need help to move around safely because of my joints and my sight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: joints have been getting more painful and stiff over the last couple of years

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives with spouse who is present and made the call; high distress about the sudden decline in mobility and vision

objective_data_offered.value: spouse holds the camera up — his face looks heavier and coarser than in older photos, with a prominent brow, and his hands look large, thick and swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay observation over a phone camera in poor hallway lighting; not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: he appears sweaty and clammy and is clearly distressed by the headache and joint pain
his voice sounds noticeably deeper than it used to
spouse reports he cannot walk safely to the bathroom tonight and needs help to stand and move because of joint pain and not being able to see to the sides
dim hallway lighting at home with a trip hazard for someone who has lost peripheral vision
